docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 77224800) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77224800) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GJ MOTORFREIGHT, LLC AKA GJ MOTORFREIGHT LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-04-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-01-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-09-2026

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GJ MOTORFREIGHT, LLC AKA GJ MOTORFREIGHT LLC $52,129.75 PRINCIPAL, $1,700.16 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,429.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 78808702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78808702) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF CREDIT (TRANSACTION ID # 78808702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78305542) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
NOTICE OF ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 78579003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78808702) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT GJ MOTORFREIGHT, LLC AKA GJ MOTORFREIGHT LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77224800) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78394978) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-28-2027 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE MAR-04-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
